benefits.description: Thymalin / thymosin alpha-1 suggested as immune modulator first step for dysautonomia / Long COVID
Semax or pinealon suggested for predominantly neurological symptoms
Vesugen suggested for circulation-based symptoms; can be paired with pinealon
BPC-157 described as great for gut health

side_effects.description: BPC-157 may cause anhedonia/depersonalization; noted as jarring, especially for those with persistent depersonalization
Other cognitive peptides (unspecified) less well tolerated especially by people with immune issues

protocol_notes: Commenter is providing recommendations to OP rather than describing personal use. Recommends thymalin (or thymosin alpha-1 if unavailable) as two courses 1-3 months apart, then reassess. Notes BPC-157 should not be taken before an immune modulator in Long COVID context, and should be avoided if depersonalization is persistent. Pinealon and vesugen noted to work well together. Probiotics recommended for gut issues over peptides.
